_note: GET /markets/:matchId — auth-gated; grants the per-match credits on first open. `market.mark` is the live price (markets-read cache, LIVE-VERIFIED). `amm.b` is real (from the mark's b_hint); `amm.q` + `amm.spread_mult` are null pending a guarded engine-emit (ADR-042) — Home doesn't need them; the trade sheet will. HTTP curl gated by DATABASE_URL.
